mount_graft_manifest.note: per-layer pre-RoPE K/V shards captured by the streamed GPT-OSS TensorCUDA harness; remount with --mount-graft-dir

mount_position_note: live tokens are RoPE-shifted after mounted graft seats; GPT-OSS sliding layers remain limited by their sliding window
note: streamed full-stack forward path with quantized TensorCUDA lm_head; score_ppl writes a teacher-forced window receipt, but this artifact alone is not generation quality, context, or GRM evidence
